item.title: White House Celebrates Inflation Beating Expectations in January
item.description: Inflation beat expectations by dropping to 2.4% in January, according to new data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics. “President Trump has defeated J...

item.title: Are US Universities Prioritizing International Students Over Citizens?
item.description: Who are America’s public universities really for? A growing backlash argues that domestic students—many with near-perfect test scores—are being edged ...

item.title: House Reps Try to Reconcile Farm and Oil Interests in E15 Talks
